raw_consumer_statement:
* * Company Name : * * Best Buy Credit Services * * Account Type : * * Credit Card * * Account Ending In : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Disputed Amount : * * {$170.00} * * Complaint : * * I am filing this complaint regarding Best Buy Credit Services refusal to credit my account for merchandise that was never received. 

I authorized a purchase in the amount of {$170.00}. However, the merchandise associated with this charge was never delivered to my residence. The carrier marked the package as delivered on or around XX/XX/year>, but no package was received. 

I requested proof of delivery, including a photo, signature confirmation, or documentation showing where the package was left. No proof was provided. On XX/XX/year>,
